issue_title: feat: Support GDC air-gapped Service Identity after auth library update
issue_body:
### Description
The recent update to the underlying auth library in `google-cloud-node` ([PR #8428](https://github.com/googleapis/google-cloud-node/pull/8428)) introduces changes that we need to adapt to in order to properly support GDC air-gapped Service Identity.

### Motivation
With the auth library updates, we should implement the corresponding changes in `gemini-cli` to ensure seamless integration and functionality for users working in GDC air-gapped environments.

### Proposed changes
* Update the relevant authentication logic in `packages/core` to utilize the new Service Identity capabilities introduced in the upstream library.
* Add any necessary configuration parameters or documentation for users operating in these environments.
notes: GDC air-gapped Service Identity request tagged with feat:. Explicitly categorized as FEATURE with empty workable spec.
